dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkAbstractPathTree.JkPathTreeStream

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.function.JkStreamDecorator<java.nio.file.Path>
      • dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkAbstractPathTree.JkPathTreeStream
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable, java.util.stream.BaseStream<java.nio.file.Path,java.util.stream.Stream<java.nio.file.Path>>, java.util.stream.Stream<java.nio.file.Path>
    Enclosing class:
    JkAbstractPathTree<T extends JkAbstractPathTree>

    public class JkAbstractPathTree.JkPathTreeStream
extends JkStreamDecorator<java.nio.file.Path>
    A decorator class for Stream that provides additional functionality specific to path trees.
